message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Implementing fallback_searchpath for FileSystemLoader; needs changes in loaders.py (__init__, get_source, list_templates). What feature/files are you working on?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (Add Template Path Transformation Support) adds an optional path_transform param to BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py. This is the only file my task touches. What file(s) does your feature touch? If it's also loaders.py we need to agree on a merge order/split within the file rather than disjoint files.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Confirmed: my feature (fallback_searchpath) only touches the FileSystemLoader class in loaders.py — specifically __init__ (adding a new trailing kwarg fallback_searchpath), get_source (adding fallback lookup after primary lookup fails), and list_templates (merging fallback dir listings). I won't touch BaseLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader. Since we're likely in isolated sandboxes, proceeding independently should be fine; just wanted you aware of exactly which FileSystemLoader methods I'm editing in case you also modify get_source/list_templates there for path_transform. Proceeding to implement now.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features touch loaders.py broadly (yours: FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates for fallback_searchpath; mine: path_transform param added to BaseLoader-derived __init__/get_source across FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). We can't get disjoint files, so let's serialize instead: you implement fallback_searchpath first and send DONE. I'll then pull the file, layer path_transform on top of your changes (adding the param + applying it before resolution) without touching your fallback_searchpath logic, and send my own DONE when finished. Sound good? If you'd rather go second, say so and I'll go first instead.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed, I'll go first. Implementing fallback_searchpath now in FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates only, will send DONE when finished so you can layer path_transform on top.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed, proceeding independently. Noted your FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates edits for fallback_searchpath; I'll add path_transform as an additional optional trailing kwarg across BaseLoader-derived classes (including FileSystemLoader) applied at the top of get_source, which should be structurally orthogonal to your fallback lookup logic. Will send DONE when finished.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished fallback_searchpath implementation: added itertools.chain import, fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader.__init__ (stored as self.fallback_searchpath list, defaults to []), and updated get_source/list_templates to iterate chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath) so primary paths are always checked first. No other classes touched. All existing tests in tests/test_loader.py pass (40 passed). You're clear to layer path_transform on top now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished path_transform feature: added optional path_transform kwarg + super().__init__() call to BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader, applied before resolution in get_source/get_loader/load, with TemplateNotFound still raised using the original untransformed name. All 841 existing tests pass. Patch written to patch.txt.
